title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS company with 100+ people across Tel Aviv and New York, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations reporting to the CRO. Requires 7+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, proven experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. A hands-on leader-doer role collaborating across time zones with the Tel Aviv HQ.
score_reason: Excellent match on all core criteria: 15+ years exceeds 7+ requirement, B2B SaaS fintech aligns perfectly with stated expertise, $30M+ ARR scaling experience is directly relevant, and Salesforce admin proficiency is explicitly required. Head of Revenue Operations role is primary target position.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of Revenue Operations role and immediately thought of you—scaling cloud cost management SaaS demands exactly the kind of RevOps infrastructure and cross-functional alignment you've built repeatedly. Your fintech + B2B SaaS background and hands-on Salesforce expertise would be critical to scaling their revenue engine across the Tel Aviv-New York time zones.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong, a revenue intelligence platform, seeks a RevOps Manager focused on territory strategy and operations to accelerate revenue growth and seller productivity through data-driven investment strategy and scalable territory design. Requires 3–5+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Strategy, or GTM planning, deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models, strong analytical skills (Excel, SQL, BI tools like Tableau/Retool), and proficiency with Salesforce. Experience with territory management tools (Fullcast, Pigment, Anaplan) is a plus.

Gong's revenue intelligence platform is ideal complement to data-driven GTM background.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Gong's RevOps Manager opening for Territory Strategy & Operations and thought of you immediately—your 15+ years scaling B2B SaaS go-to-market models and deep expertise in pipeline forecasting and territory optimization seems like a natural fit for accelerating Gong's seller productivity through data-driven strategy. With your track record in Salesforce-driven operations and analytical rigor around CAC/LTV, you'd bring the depth this role needs to design scalable territory frameworks.
